sourceLabel: Lexicon IELTS and Spoken English Institute discounts and policies

entries.title: Discount and offer guidance
entries.content: Lexicon may run limited offers such as weekday-batch discounts, repeat-attempt concessions, or occasional paired-admission offers for friends or siblings. These are not assumed to be permanently active for every batch, so the counsellor should confirm the current offer window instead of promising a discount by default.

entries.title: No guaranteed band score
entries.content: Lexicon does not promise a guaranteed IELTS band score purely from a WhatsApp chat or admission payment. A learner's result depends on their baseline level, attendance, practice consistency, and mock-test discipline. The safest front-desk answer is to explain the training format and support system, not to overpromise a fixed band like 7 or 8.

entries.title: Visa and application scope boundary
entries.content: Lexicon's primary role is English-test training and communication coaching. The team may explain how IELTS fits into study-abroad or migration plans, but it does not promise full visa filing, SOP drafting, embassy handling, or guaranteed college-admission consultancy as part of a normal coaching enrolment.
